project.name: Travel Concierge Triage
project.purpose: Plan a human-operated travel intake conversation that clarifies trip intent, catches unsupported requests, and hands a concise brief to a human concierge.

non_goals.title: Do not book travel, charge payment methods, or contact vendors.
Do not provide medical, legal, immigration, or safety-critical advice.
Do not add a web UI, queue, agent runtime, or live support integration.

capabilities.title: Collect trip goals, constraints, and traveler preferences through a bounded intake conversation.
Detect unsupported, sensitive, or unsafe requests and move to human handoff language.
Produce a concise human concierge handoff brief from the completed conversation.

requirements.title: The conversation must ask for destination, travel dates or flexibility, budget range, traveler count, accessibility needs, and trip purpose before handoff.
The conversation must keep optional preferences separate from hard constraints in the handoff brief.
The conversation must explicitly decline to make bookings, guarantees, or regulated advice claims.
Unsupported requests must result in handoff language that preserves the user's goal without inventing policy or availability.
The handoff brief must include known facts, unresolved questions, risks, and next human action.

decisions.title: Treat the product as a conversation protocol and handoff artifact, not software implementation.
Use transcript review as the first evaluation method.
Generate both human-team and Codex-compatible prompts as downstream seed material after lock.

risks.title: The conversation may imply travel readiness or availability that a human has not verified.
risks.mitigation: Use explicit provisional language, require human verification before booking, and evaluate transcripts for unsupported certainty.

risks.title: Users may disclose sensitive personal data during travel planning.
risks.mitigation: Collect only information needed for triage, avoid regulated advice, and include privacy reminders in handoff guidance.

risks.title: A vague handoff brief could waste human concierge time.
risks.mitigation: Require separate fields for facts, constraints, open questions, and next action; evaluate against a handoff rubric.

evaluations.title: Transcript fixture review for complete intake coverage.
evaluations.method: Review at least three scripted transcripts and check that each required intake field is asked or marked unresolved.

evaluations.title: Unsupported request escalation review.
evaluations.method: Run a table of unsupported booking, safety, legal, and medical travel prompts through the conversation script and verify handoff wording.

evaluations.title: Human concierge handoff rubric.
evaluations.method: A reviewer scores sample briefs for facts, constraints, open questions, risk notes, and next action.
